checklist.title: Keep the rollout moving
checklist.description: A short list to tighten coverage and improve resilience.
items: Connect one backup channel for your sales bot before the next campaign push.
Promote the staging prompt variant after the current A/B experiment reaches significance.
Add one more FAQ document batch to reduce escalations on refund questions.
Review billing thresholds and token pack alerts before month-end traffic spikes.
